content: Today should be a day of peace but it's not. Everything peaceful I try to do feels interrupted by negative thoughts and feelings. Trivial things are an inconvinience. Feels like the world is out to get me. I should find a way to stop feeling like this. Fake it until I make it maybe? It's hard when everyone around me if feeling like shit too. Seasonally affected depression? Daylight savings is a bitch.. Could be that
